steps.title: Identify the services shown on the graph
steps.content: The graph displays project leaders' ratings for three specific services: provision of medicinal plants (2), improvement of neighborhood attachment (3), and improvement of local microclimate (3). Since the question asks for a choice that most effectively uses data from the graph, the correct answer must compare two of these displayed services.

steps.title: Match the accurate comparison
steps.content: Choices B and D reference services not shown on the graph, so they cannot effectively use the displayed data. Choice C uses shown services but reverses the relationship—it claims local microclimate (3) is rated lower than medicinal plants (2), contradicting the graph. Choice A correctly uses the graph's data: project leaders rated medicinal plants (2) lower than local microclimate (3). That matches choice A — A is correct.
